tips_en: I recommend reading the Arbor paper first, as it tackles the most ambitious problem—long-horizon autonomous research—with a clear core mechanism (Hypothesis Tree Refinement) that connects naturally to Claw-SWE-Bench, which provides the rigorous evaluation infrastructure needed to compare such agent systems. Together, these two papers form a compelling pair on the agent design–evaluation loop: Arbor advances agent capability while Claw-SWE-Bench disentangles the confounding factors (model, harness, cost) that currently obscure fair comparison. The MPI router paper is a more focused contribution to MoE training efficiency and could complement Arbor's model-training AO tasks as a downstream optimization.
tips_zh: 我建议先阅读Arbor论文，因为它解决的是最具雄心的课题——长周期自主研究——其核心机制（假设树精炼）与Claw-SWE-Bench自然呼应，后者恰好提供了严谨比较此类智能体系统所需的评估基础设施。这两篇论文共同构成了关于"智能体设计—评估"闭环的有趣组合：Arbor推进智能体能力，Claw-SWE-Bench则拆解了当前公平比较中被混淆的模型、框架与成本因素。MPI路由器论文是面向MoE训练效率的更聚焦贡献，可作为Arbor模型训练AO任务的下游优化参考。
